title: NHSRC Notification 2026 - Apply Online for Senior Consultant Posts
description: National Health Systems Resource Centre (NHSRC) has declared the latest job notification for 2026. To fill the vacancies for various Senior Consultant Jobs. Candidates who have completed their MBBS, BDS, B.Sc Nursing, B.E/ B.Tech, Post Graduation, Diploma, or MBA can grab this chance and apply for the NHSRC Notification 2026 . Here we provide more information about the age limit, selection process, salary structure, education details, application fee, and how to apply for these posts. Interes...
